deployment_evidence.production_promotion: PR #501 (fix/compliance-finding-deeplink-ai-tagging): audit finding evidence links now deep-link to /audits?view=findings&findingId=N; Audits.tsx reads URL params and highlights/scrolls to specific finding card; AI tagging activated (was permanently dormant: ai_client=None); fixed wrong .analyze() call to .complete(); expanded AI prompt to all clause levels + ISO 27001 Annex A; added useAi toggle (default on) to auto-tagger UI. CI 24095317858 success → staging 24095565078 success → production 24095823488 success (conclusion: success, headSha: 1a9f7bd8).

deployment_evidence.governance_note: PR #501 addresses 3-round WCS review findings: P0 dead AI path (ai_client never injected), P0 wrong .analyze() signature (TypeError at runtime), P0 audit finding deep-link (navigated to /audits board instead of specific finding), P1 AI never invoked from UI (useAi always false), P1 ISO 27001 Annex A blind spot in AI context (level-2 filter excluded Annex A). All CI gates passed.

changes_this_release: PR #501: Audit finding evidence links deep-link to /audits?view=findings&findingId=N
PR #501: Audits.tsx reads ?view=findings&findingId=N URL params, switches to findings tab, highlights and scrolls to specific finding card
PR #501: Wire get_ai_client() into ISOComplianceService singleton (AI tagging was permanently dormant)
PR #501: Fix ai_enhanced_tagging() .analyze() call to .complete() (wrong signature would TypeError at runtime)
PR #501: Expand AI prompt to include ALL clause levels + ISO 27001 Annex A; add evidence_snippet; prevent overloaded keyword false positives
PR #501: Add useAi toggle (default: AI on) and loading spinner to auto-tagger dialog
PR #501: Audits.test.tsx: mock useSearchParams to prevent Router context failure in unit tests
